# PWFA, Guidance Rollbacks Highlight New EEOC Reg Agenda

By **Vin Gurrieri** · July 6, 2026, 8:12 PM EDT

The U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission plans to float a revision of its Pregnant Workers Fairness Act regulations and scrap decades-old guidance pertaining to sex and national origin bias by the...
